item.evidence_snippet: The actor has used the following commands to enable port forwarding [T1090] on the host: "cmd.exe /c \"netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=9999 connectaddress=<rfc1918 internal ip address> connectport=8443 protocol=tcp\"

The actor has used the following commands to enable port forwarding [T1090] on the host: "cmd.exe /c \"netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=9999 connectaddress=<rfc1918 internal ip address> connectport=8443 protocol=tcp\"
